[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Jaeffis''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and the commander in charge of defending the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[CEC shipyards|shipyards]] from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attack following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. When Admiral [[Roek]] was recalled along with his task force to reinforce the system's defenses, it was presumed by New Republic-affiliated agent [[Dirk Harkness]] that Jaeffis would end up reporting to Roek.
